query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "fastcontext: training efficient repository explorer for coding agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (efficient context retrieval for coding agents) and domain (LLM-based code generation) as the user's question, specifically addressing the "Repository Explorer" component through a novel API retrieval technique. Although it proposes a different specific architecture ("DeepCodeSeek" vs. "FastContext"), it provides essential prior work on the problem of training efficient, real-time context explorers for coding ag
